tasks.prompt: Write 5 original English sentences using Paragraph Writing.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Paragraph Writing का उपयोग करते हुए 5 नए वाक्य लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: My favourite season is the rainy season. Everything becomes green in the rain. I like reading books a lot. Books are a treasure of knowledge. My village is very beautiful.

tasks.prompt: Write a short paragraph (5-6 lines) using Paragraph Writing.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Paragraph Writing का उपयोग करते हुए एक छोटा पैराग्राफ लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: There are green fields and clean air there. Education is very important in life. It makes us a better person. We should make good use of time. The one who wastes time regrets later.

tasks.prompt: Translate into English: "स्वास्थ्य ही असली धन है।"
tasks.hindiPrompt: नीचे दिए गए वाक्य का अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद करें।

tasks.prompt: Correct this sentence: "Books is a treasure of knowledge."
tasks.hindiPrompt: इस वाक्य में गलती ठीक कीजिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: Books are a treasure of knowledge.

tasks.prompt: Write a short 4-line dialogue using Paragraph Writing.
tasks.hindiPrompt: Paragraph Writing का उपयोग करते हुए एक संवाद लिखिए।
tasks.sampleAnswer: My mother is my best friend. She always supports me. Nature teaches us a lot. We should protect trees.
